gemini.note: Hard-coded in gemma4_helper.py _GEMINI_DAILY_LIMIT (added 2026-04-25). Currently only deep-verify auto-call uses it; cap is plenty of headroom.

ai_consensus.gemini:
The data dangerously projects 0 calls despite 20 active timers, blinding the risk model.

**(a) Runaway loops:** Gemini lacks Anthropic’s 60s error cooldown. A failing "deep-verify" auto-call will recursively spam, burning its 100-call limit in seconds.
**(b) Missing caps:** Provider-level billing hard-stops are missing; limits rely entirely on local Python code. *Forecast if wrong:* If we assume these local caps hold, but a bug bypasses `shared_gates.py`, the attached credit card drains infinitely.
**(c) 2x rate blow-ups:** Anthropic’s cap assumes Haiku ($1.50/day). If dynamic routing swaps Haiku for Opus, 1,000 calls (2x rate) blows up to ~$100+/day. 
**(d) Stealth burn:** The 20 invisible timers could execute "archived" Perplexity code. With active keys, this silently repeats the histor
ai_consensus.anthropic:
{'answer': '# API Budget Blow-Up Audit

**(a) Runaway loops:** 20 timers discovered but **0 projected calls** across all 4 providers — the auditor isn't actually parsing the schedules. A timer firing every 60s = 1,440 calls/day; if Anthropic Haiku, that hits the 500-cap by 08:20 UTC, but Perplexity (no code-path cap beyond 20) or xAI loops would silently bypass detection. Overall_risk "LOW" is false-negative.

**(b) Missing caps:** All four caps are *daily* only — no per-minute/hour throttle, no monthly ceiling, no global USD kill-switch. The Apr 23 $100 Perplexity incident proves daily-only caps fail to bound burst spend.

**(c) 2× rate blow-ups:** Anthropic 500→1,000/day ≈ $3/day (safe). Perplexity 20→40 at ~$5/req ≈ $200/day (repeats Apr 23). xAI 50→100 Grok-4 ≈ $50–150/day. Gemi
ai_consensus.grok:
**Blow-up scenarios:**

(a) **Runaway loops**: 20 discovered timers but *zero* projected calls = unaccounted scheduled tasks. Any error loop bypassing Anthropic's 60s cooldown or Gemini's cache will hammer APIs at >1 call/sec.

(b) **Missing daily caps**: XAI and Perplexity rely on legacy caps tied to archived news_monitor.py. No hard enforcement if any remnant or new daemon wakes up.

(c) **2x rate blow-up**: Anthropic (expected 0 → 1000 calls) stays under $3/day. Gemini remains safe. Perplexity/XAI legacy paths are the real risk.

(d) **Silent burner**: **Perplexity** — past $100 incident, explicit "NEVER use for code" rule, lowest cap (20/day), and zero visibility in current projections.

Raise overall_risk to MEDIUM before launch.
